name: split-flap-ascii
description: Split-flap display effect for ASCII characters — like old train station departure boards

scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=iife --global-name=SplitFlap --outfile=dist/split-flap.iife.js && npx esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.mjs

author: yiliangs
